Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
G. Scott Emblidge, Esq. for defendant and moving party: Roberta Boomer
Herbert W. Yanowitz, Esq. for plaintiff and opposing party: Bruce W. Cornia

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Roberta Boomer's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to provide supplemental responses on or before March 28, 2007. If an interrogatory cannot be answered completely, it shall be answered to the extent possible. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
